headline: Grid Connected Infrastructure Executes Another Land Under Power Generation Lease
summary: HOUSTON, July 09, 2026--GCI signs a 20-year lease for the 100MW Megamouth Energy Storage Project near Houston, converting industrial land into powered real estate in ERCOT.
